name: antigravity-skills
description: Empower agents with professional capabilities through modular SKILL.md definitions for full-stack development, complex logic planning, multimedia processing, and more. Compatible with Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Codex, and other AI coding tools.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed (312 stars, MIT, Python, created Jan 2026). Comprehensive skills library with 20+ skill subdirectories (brainstorming, dispatching-parallel-agents, frontend-design, context-optimization, etc.). Structured .claude-plugin configuration. Includes skills_index.json and skills_sources.json for metadata tracking. CONTRIBUTING.md and SECURITY.md present. Bilingual documentation (EN/ZH). Cross-IDE compatibility is a notable strength. Python scripts in skills/. Concern: 0 recorded forks despite 312 stars - may indicate recent star growth.
